title: Orochi’s Rage and Komurasaki’s Defiance
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Kyoshiro, Unknown person #9, Yasuie, Unknown person #10, Law, Raizo as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Sanji, Robin, Nami, and others move through the capital as Orochi’s obsession with Komurasaki turns violent.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....well, then. All I need to do now is deliver his body...

dialogue.speaker: Kyoshiro
dialogue.text: To boss kyoshiro, I suppose.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never did find out his true identity... oh well.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey!! Why are we LEAV- ing sangoro behind!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He told us to go on ahead without him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: He did say that... but still!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll ask franchise and usohachi to modify the design later...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: G'IA AAAAH!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They'll definitely send more people after us. We just keep causing problem after problem...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We probably won't be able to stay in the capital.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Whoa!

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: Let's head to ebisu Town first!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The following

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: An old...

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: and suspicious room.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: This country has been isolated for centuries...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They crafted the poneglyphs... There must be one some- where in this country.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Perhaps there's a hidden door somewhere around here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Looking for some- thing?

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: Acting suspicious around Ninjas...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What a foolish thing to do!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: No way!! When did they...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you not know what a Ninja is?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: She's probably an outsider...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I am not sure if

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I'll give you one chance to explain yourself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You're quite the troublesome Geisha...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I mean it when I say one.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: T/N: The name of one of the seven gods of luck in Japan. A tall- headed god of wealth, happiness, and longevity.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm worried about big bro luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: He's going to be fine, O-TAMA! Nin-nin!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's not big enough to be a G/ANT... but she's certainly a large human!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but my master told me that nobody has ever escaped from Ldon's prison...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Nin- NIN!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: TAAAH!! TOOOH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's true that Raiza still hasn't reported back yet...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I was stronger, I'd go to save him right now, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What is that!? Nin-nin!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...It's... a person?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I wonder who's bigger... her or kaidou?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Huu Uuch? That's...

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 42 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
